title: Election 2026 LIVE: Yusuf Pathan calls SIR an injustice to eligible voters; PM Modi targets Mamata Banerjee
description: Election 2026 LIVE: TMC leader Yusuf Pathan said that SIR is udermining the voting rights of the citizens of West Bengal, while also praising efforts of CM Mamata Banerjee for fighting for people's rights. Meanwhile, Modi accused TMC of 15 years of corruption in a Siliguri rally on April 12.
